title: VCE 2 Pack PTFE Industrial Sealant Tape White Thread Seal Tape,12mm x 13m
features: WIDE APPLICATION – This Teflon tape is used to seal screw joints to reduce water leakage around the screw threads when connecting a hose pipe to a tap, shower head, bathroom basin, washing machine pipe, kitchen leaking sink, valve, cistern connector, radiator. It’s a practical solution for enhancing the tightness of pipes and keeping a threaded pipe connection watertight.

EASY & QUICK FIXING - Just unscrew pipes, wrap a couple winds round the threads and close it up, everyone can easily stop or reduce leaks on valve, screw hose connectors. Small neat package takes up little space, handy to have in your toolbox for occasional minor plumbing jobs till a plumber arrives.

EXCELLENT MATERIAL - PTFE (Polytetrafluoroethylene) tape is cleaner and more convenient than white pipe jointing compound. VCE products don't fray or suddenly go into small threads like other brands and will be easily removed if required. It has an excellent characteristic of sealing, ductility, and corrosion resistance. Sealing temperature: -190℃ to 370 °C, PH Range:1-14, High Pressure Resistance: 150~200kg/cm2.

KINDLY NOTE – The tape is NOT ADHESIVE and is a for joints when you join any threaded pipes together that carry water to help avoid leaks. It’s not a repair on any pipe. It can be used on MINOR gas connections if it won't be impacted by excessive air pressure after winding to cause winding failure. It is recommended that you consult a plumber to confirm.

CONSIDERATE PACKAGING & SERVICE - The pack contains 2 spools that arrive in a resealable pouch which is good for keeping it clean and safe in your toolbox, drawer when needed again. There is Snap-On cover on these rolls to stop the tape unwrapping in your toolbox. If there is any product problem, please don't worry, all our products have 18 months warranty for quality problem and invoice including VAT service and we will try our best to solve the problem for you.
description: Product Description Works a treat for reducing water leakage around the screw threads Excellent for a quick fix - If you have a plumbing joint that has a slight leak no matter how tight it is or you just want to make sure a new joint doesn't leak, you can use this tape on any thread on any water pipes to help avoid leaks and keep ahreaded pipe connection watertight. Snap-On cover on the roll to stop the tape unwrapping in your toolbox. Small neat package, takes up next to no space. Handy resealable pouch packaging makes it easy to find and keep safe in your toolbox Temperature Range -190℃ to 370 °C PH Range 1-14 High Pressure Resistance 150~200kg/cm2 Length*Width 520" * 0.5" Good Density PTFE tape is cleaner and more convenient than white pipe jointing compound VCE product packaging is more considrrate for keeping in your DIY tool bag Strong Ductility Less sticky on the fingers Easy to remove Won't fray or suddenly go into small threads. Outdoor & indoor use Ideal for compression fittings and screw hose connectors in garden, washroom, kitchen. If you are mating male to female threads then you will get a tight seal.
